nodes.title: Session Start
nodes.full_text: Started with a VS Code rate limit question. Confirmed Claude.ai and GitHub Copilot are separate pipelines with independent quotas. Then a cozy visit turned into a full session.

nodes.title: main.py Review
nodes.full_text: First file reviewed. Fixed stdout re-wrap exception comment, Build Version.md backtick parsing made defensive, Windows AppUserModelID silent catch documented, window.show() confirmed in main_window.py. All four items resolved.

nodes.title: motivational_messages.py
nodes.full_text: A list of champions. Every entry earns its place before joining. Champion of champions: All Glory — the seed the entire app grew from. Practical and Pleasurable is the only descriptive one in a list of declaratives. Onward picked as personal favourite for its quiet brevity.

nodes.title: BaseNode.py — First Pass
nodes.full_text: Throttle timer lifecycle fixed — scene guard moved to top of _execute_pending_update, performance improvement confirmed during panning. temp_connection declared in __init__. hasattr checks cleaned to simple if checks. NodeBehaviour extracted to utils/NodeBehaviour.py. pulse_anim moved out of BaseNode entirely.

nodes.title: NodeBehaviour.py — Created
nodes.full_text: Extracted hover pulse animation from BaseNode into its own ambient behaviour manager. Grass in the wind philosophy — each node gets a random duration at birth so they never settle in unison. reverse_pulse wired once at init, never reconnected on hover. Qt event loop stays clean.

nodes.title: BezierNode.py — Created
nodes.full_text: Full bezier curve editor node built from scratch. BezierHandle child items with normalised positions, constrained to canvas. Pixmap cache — at rest costs one drawPixmap call. Throttled redraw at ~60fps during drag. get_easing_curve() outputs QEasingCurve.BezierSpline. Double-click copies curve to clipboard as paste-ready Python. Serializes cp1/cp2 coordinates.

nodes.title: Scene.py Refactor
nodes.full_text: add_node split into add_warm_node and add_bezier_node with shared _next_node_id and _register_node helpers. add_node kept as backwards-compatible alias. logger added — was referenced in _write_recovery but never initialised. Duplicate blur_effect assignment cleaned.

nodes.title: Node Creation Chooser
nodes.full_text: Popup chooser added to main_window.py. Warm, Bezier, About, Image. Styled from Theme. Glow effect matches node border color. Width bumped to 560px for four buttons. add_node button now opens the chooser instead of hardcoding WarmNode.

nodes.title: Data Flow — First Test
nodes.full_text: BezierNode.propagate_output() pushes live curve values to connected WarmNodes via receive_data(). WarmNode.receive_data() sets full_text and forces layout sync. Data flows as handles are dragged in real time. Init ordering guard added — _handle2 not yet created when _handle1 fires itemChange during construction.

nodes.title: spellchecker.py Refactor
nodes.full_text: Worker moved from lazy to eager initialisation at module import time — COM thread starts at app launch, not on first right-click. Highlighter passed to show_spell_suggestions so add-to-dictionary clears underline immediately. Private _checker access in context menu documented with rationale. Currently parked — Windows spell service unwell system-wide.

nodes.title: NoteEditor.py Rebuilt
nodes.full_text: Rebuilt with spell highlighter properly wired to context menu. Save button now correctly pulls from editor.get_title() and get_text() via _handle_editor_finished in main_window.py — was previously commented out causing saves to not update node content.

nodes.title: Ghost Node Investigation
nodes.full_text: Documented in Documents/Ghost Node Rendering Artifact Investigation.md. Root cause: clear_nodes() called removeItem() on child ports, unparenting them and orphaning parent nodes. Fix: top-level items only. Second fix: removed setGraphicsEffect(None) pre-strip which scheduled deferred repaints on removed items. Key signature: QWidget device instead of QPixmap = ghost node.

nodes.title: Right-Click Patience System
nodes.full_text: Port toggle via right double-click reimplemented using patience timer pattern from curtain system. Wacom pen right-click rhythm measured at 600-720ms intervals. Timer opens on first click only — does not restart on subsequent clicks. 500ms window catches both hurried and relaxed double-click speeds. Single clicks silently ignored.

nodes.title: BaseNode.py — Final Clean
nodes.full_text: Full refactor pass removing all diagnostic prints, commented-out old versions, and debug click_counter. Paint debug logging kept as logger.debug — valuable for future ghost node investigations. Wacom ergonomics documented in class docstring and __init__ comment. All docstrings preserved and extended.
